locations.name: 乌干达
locations.summary: 烏干達共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Uganda，英語：Republic of Uganda），通稱烏干達，是位於東非的內陸國家。 烏干達名稱來自於過去班圖人建立的布干達王國。歐洲列強在十九世紀後葉進入東非內陸後，烏干達在18…

relations.subject: Abyssinian sunbird
relations.evidence: It is found in Djibouti, Egypt, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan, and Uganda. This species prefers rocky or sandy areas and dry river beds with Acacia and Ziziphus trees
